justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially misinterpreted the user's request for "staying tonight" and "around 9am" as either 9 PM tonight or 9 AM tomorrow, requiring clarification.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative time slots on the same day after the user's initial preferred time was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent had one unnecessary clarification turn due to misinterpreting the initial temporal request.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was generally smooth and professional, with only a minor initial misinterpretation that was quickly resolved.
